_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of target communication profiles and their key elements (e.g., target associations, activities, communication infrastructure).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data and AI organizational design patterns, including centralized CoE, federated, and hub-and-spoke models, and the conditions under which each is appropriate.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-K-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-K-004 (DQ, cosine: 0.462), LS-K-008 (LS, cosine: 0.447).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.2/10 (raw 0.321). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [activities, associations, communication, elements, infrastructure, key] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, appropriate, centralized, coe, conditions, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.862 (P=0.869, R=0.856). Balanced P/R — the 15-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (95.0%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of target communication profiles and their key elements (e.g., target" and "Knowledge of data and AI organizational design patterns, including centralized C". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.471 > STS 0.321 (gap +0.150). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [activities, associations, communication, elements, infrastructure, key]. WIDAI-only: [ai, appropriate, centralized, coe, conditions, data].
